## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 6, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _A-nonymous2_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "This is a step by step timer outlining what to focus on, constraining you to very strict timings and the one page that is supposed to give guidance doesn't work I'm tired of these apps not having proper tutorials and entire broken pages I look down at my phone after completing my tasks and I see notifications saying, "This is your last chance to do the routine". If I open up the app and I'm trying a routine out for the first time, I see these aggressive signaling telling me to get back on track. I'm not looking at my phone because I'm focused and it just demands my attention which is distracting in itself I'm being threatened and infantilized in response to assumed negligence. There is no guidance, only guilt."
            2. _watkinsemma_, Mar 29, 2026, 1/5: "I have my iPhone set with the font larger so it’s easier to see. This app is unreadable and therefore unusable if you have anything other than the standard font set."
            3. _nonawithoutanosering_, Feb 6, 2026, 3/5: "I think someone of the glitches need to be fixed. Case in point why have a tick button on your lock screen if it doesn’t automatically move you on to the next stage? It just opens the app. Similarly sometimes it does work, or what it is doing now which is I ticked to complete the task which ends the routine and the timer is still going. So love the app and what it does but it is glitchy as heck. UPDATE: it has now helpfully signed me out, doesn’t recognise my sign in and when I try to make a new account it has glitched and won’t go through"
